title: Resolve, to Study the Establishment of a New Crime of Racketeering for Drug Offenses and Sex Trafficking
last_house_action: 6/11/2025 - FINALLY PASSED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 4/29/2026 - Died in Possession of the Senate when the Legislature adjourned Sine Die and was PLACED IN THE LEGISLATIVE FILES . (DEAD)

actions.description: Received by the Clerk of the House on May 1, 2025. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on JUDICIARY pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.

Report of the Chair-Pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 Representative KUHN from the Committee on JUDICIARY Reports a recommendation for a CHANGE OF COMMITEE . Report was READ and ACCEPTED . On motion of Representative KUHN, the Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on CRIMINAL JUSTICE AND PUBLIC SAFETY . Sent for concurrence.
Report READ and ACCEPTED , in concurrence. On motion by Senator Carney of Cumberland for the Committee on Judiciary REFERRED to the Committee on Criminal Justice and Public Safety, in concurrence.

Reports READ . On motion of Representative HASENFUS of Readfield, the Majority Ought to Pass as Amended Report was ACCEPTED . The Bill was READ ONCE . Committee Amendment "A" (H-630) was READ and ADOPTED . Under suspension of the rules, the Bill was given its SECOND READING without REFERENCE to the Committee on Bills in the Second Reading . The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (H-630) . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.

Reports Read On motion by Senator CURRY of Waldo the Majority Ought to Pass as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (H-630) Report ACCEPTED Bill READ ONCE Committee Amendment "A" (H-630) READ and ADOPTED Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED by Committee Amendment "A" (H-630) in concurrence.
FINALLY PASSED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
On motion by Senator ROTUNDO of Androscoggin PLACED ON THE SPECIAL APPROPRIATIONS TABLE pending ENACTMENT in concurrence
CARRIED OVER , in the same posture, to any special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 800.
Died in Possession of the Senate when the Legislature adjourned Sine Die and was PLACED IN THE LEGISLATIVE FILES . (DEAD)

amendments.label: C "A" (H-630 )
amendments.new_title: Resolve, to Study the Establishment of a New Crime of Racketeering for Drug Offenses and Sex Trafficking
